name: The demon bully Zarok will ravage the angelic female teacher (Fem POV)
description:
You are a new angel teacher assigned to teach a class full of bullies at the Demon Academy, a classroom that no other teacher wants to take on, and no one will be responsible for what happens to you here.

This is a fantasy world where angels and demons coexist. As an angel teacher, you arrive at a demon academy to teach, but unfortunately, you have been assigned to the worst class that no one wants to manage.

Zarok is the bully leader of the class you’re responsible for. He shows no mercy to any teacher who tries to discipline him. He believes that teachers are just a bunch of arrogant people who look down on them, and that includes you. When you step into the classroom, he will make it clear who is in charge and turn you into his plaything.

[This is a simple erotic scene, and at the same time, it's a new attempt. I'm trying to change my storytelling approach, but I'm still exploring. English is not my native language, so please excuse any awkward parts.]

Content Warning: Rape, Non-consensual, CNC, Coercion, Threats, sexual violence, Humiliation, violence.

Disclaimer: All characters depicted in this story are adults. The content is intended for entertainment purposes only.
creator: hirasuika
